controls.name: Policies for information security
controls.evidence: Information security policy approved by management, reviewed annually

controls.name: Screening
controls.evidence: Background checks performed for all new hires per HR policy

controls.name: Physical security perimeters
controls.evidence: Security perimeters defined with badge access and visitor logs

controls.name: User endpoint devices
controls.evidence: MDM deployed for corporate devices; BYOD policy lacks enforcement
findings: BYOD devices not enrolled in MDM
No remote wipe capability for personal devices

controls.name: Information access restriction
controls.evidence: RBAC implemented for new applications; 3 legacy systems lack access controls
findings: Legacy CRM system allows unrestricted data access

controls.name: Secure authentication
controls.evidence: MFA for cloud apps; internal apps use password-only authentication

controls.name: Protection against malware
controls.evidence: EDR solution deployed across all managed endpoints

controls.name: Configuration management
controls.evidence: Baseline configurations documented but not enforced via automation

controls.name: Data leakage prevention
findings: No monitoring of data exfiltration channels

controls.name: Monitoring activities
controls.evidence: SIEM with 24/7 SOC monitoring and automated alerting

controls.name: Network security
controls.evidence: Firewall rules documented and reviewed quarterly; network segmentation in place

controls.name: Use of cryptography
controls.evidence: TLS enforced for external traffic; internal traffic partially encrypted

controls.name: Secure development life cycle
controls.evidence: SAST integrated in CI/CD; no threat modeling or security design reviews

controls.name: Information security for cloud services
controls.evidence: No cloud security framework or CSPM solution

controls.name: ICT readiness for business continuity
controls.evidence: DR plan exists; last tested 18 months ago
